extract: Kyurem (Japanese: キュレム Kyurem) is a dual-type Dragon/Ice Legendary Pokémon introduced in Generation V. While it is not known to evolve into or from any other Pokémon, Kyurem can change forms through a process called Absofusion (Japanese: 吸収合体(きゅうしゅうがったい) Absorb Union) that merges it with one of two Pokémon using the DNA Splicers. This also causes it to learn two new moves and gain a new Ability. When it Absofuses with Reshiram, it becomes White Kyurem, learns Fusion Flare and Ice Burn, and gains Turboblaze. When it Absofuses with Zekrom, it becomes Black Kyurem, learns Fusion Bolt and Freeze Shock, and gains Teravolt. (Refer to Game data→Form data for more details.) Kyurem, Reshiram, and Zekrom are often collectively referred to as the Tao trio by fans. The group is referred to in the myths and legends of the Unova region. In Kyurem VS. The Sword of Justice, it is also associated with the Swords of Justice. Kyurem is the game mascot of Pokémon Black Version 2 and White Version 2, appearing on the boxart of both games as Black Kyurem and White Kyurem, respectively.
